reviews.review_description: Ridiculous game, stupid ending, and a time waster in the worst way. Save your money and time.

reviews.review_title: Way to real predicting the future
reviews.review_description: Fun to play through once. Some parts are a little redundant but glad I bought it.
Super appropriate
Just dont buy it
Not worth the money in my opinion. It was funny but boring.
Funny game I want more right meow

reviews.review_title: Don’t pay attention to bad reviews…
reviews.review_description:
It is a fun app, and of course to be considered as a joke which is its main purpose. 
Have fun and enjoy the guns!!
This app should be free, so you can delete it without feeling you just been scammed.

As an American, I have to say that this game is the most realistic depiction of life in the USA that I have experienced in VR. Everything from picking up toys with guns to dancing with guns to flipping burgers with guns brought back memories of my days growing up in the US of A.
I don't want to say too much more because that would spoil the game, but I would like to say that the developers have done an excellent job. I was extremely surprised to learn that they are based in Australia and not the Land of the Free (TM). Bravo.
Regarding the 1-star reviews I'm seeing about this game, though--do you people hate America? I'm surprised and saddened by the negativity!
'MURCA!!!

I'd just make it short and sweet:  Title is misleading  about game. Not suitable  for all audiences. One sided propaganda.

Did get a chuckle at the shotgun wedding.

This game should be removed.  As an American I never used a gun for anything like that.  Seriously this game needs to be taken down one star is giving it the best of praises it deserves negative 5 stars for implying the way Americans use gun that is not the American dream
The ending came out of left field but most of the game was fun, I wish there was more

But as a worried mom, appreciator of excellent writing AND a lifelong gamer who uses VR to escape the hellscape that is American life these days I cannot express how much this game impressed me.

Sure, I’m exhausted from capitalism and everything is a crapshow and I have no idea if my youngest will even make it out of HS thanks to guns, but this bite-sized arcade-style game really makes me feel like my 47 years of struggle and worry have not gone unnoticed by smart game developers in countries who actually give a flying crap about their citizens. 

If you’re a knuckle dragging, gun loving MAGA gamer, one who likely adores Andrew Tate and thinks people should arm up in a Target to buy diapers, prepare to write a “I wish I could give this zero stars” review.

If you’re just exhausted and want to laugh at the absolute absurdity of American culture but you also really miss Jon Stewart, this is for you. I’ve never LOLd at a game through tears of sadness the way this has made me LOL. 

Kudos to the writers. You nailed it.

This game has different mechanics with lots of parody content about the lack of gun control in the US. You play a bunch of minigames with guns. Some people will get triggered because any criticism/ridicule/parody of guns makes them feel attacked, but no decent human being cares or will care about how that type of person feels, so 5/5 I will recommend it.

The only good thing Australia ever produced was Paul Hogan and the Fairbairn brothers. This game is commie garbage. Sloppy game design, buggy mess. Whole thing spirals down the toilet in a drug addled feverdream of a non-climax. Don't waste your hard earned money. One star because I can't 'no-star'.

This game is a great time waster, and a lot of fun comedy. Before I knew it 2 hours went buy, did encounter a couple bugs, not sure if was something I was doing or the game since I am new to VR gaming, but the hand gun you use to stabilize the rifles and shotgun, kept messing up and not working correctly other than that great game!

Repetitive and boring. Poor shooting mechanics. Almost nothing is interactable/breakable/shootable. Terrible graphics, everything looks free stock 3d models. It's the same stuff over and over, and the fun ends after 5 minutes.
It should be a free demo, absolutely not worth the cost.
Don’t buy this game you can’t do anything other than shoot your guns everywhere why does it even cost money it should be free because of the bad graphics horrible ￼gameplay DON’T BUY THIS GAME

I get what the game was going for. Functionally it’s fine. It looks fine enough, though the actual firearm models and usage are Hollywood accurate. But that’s never been enough to get a review from me. What makes me not like the game is the fact that it is blatantly trying to be social commentary with no nuance to it. It tries to make points about firearms in American life without actually addressing any legitimate reasons that the average American would own a gun. 
Basically if I should judge it as a game, then it’s a basic  on rails shooter with extremely limited firearms detail. And if it’s commentary then it’s the equivalent of scrolling Twitter for headlines then writing a political thesis. And based on the Australian production credits that me have been the extent of the research. Either way it’s shallow to the point of mind numbing.

I will however give points for the American chamber flags that pop up when the magazine is empty ( and just magically disappears from the firearm). Those did get a legit chuckle out of me.
So far I'm loving this game, but I keep getting a soft lock on chapter five after cleaning the room and purchasing the bolt action rifle.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, sorry to hear your ran into a bug! Can you please send us more detail about the issue at contact[at]samuraipunk.com, and we'll investigate. 
In the meantime, you can try restarting the level via the chapter select and see if it works with another attempt.

reviews.review_description: GOOD

"Trover Saves the Universe", but with Guns!
....God bless 'Merica! 😉

What an unexpected type of game! 
The humor, the “dark ride” quality. 
Quest 2 could definitely use more of this kind of thing. 
I wish the graphics were better, but I look forward to more from this game and company in years to come.

Just started playing this “shooter” type game and absolutely love it.  The Carnival style dark ride concept had me right from the start but the overall unique quality of this game is unlike anything I’ve played. Maybe a little overkill on the long winded dialogue but lots of fun loaded with surprises. The “Dance Off” has a very cool, original “do what I do” element I personally have not seen before. Definitely geared toward the more mature/adult crowd.  
(Skip the politics and just enjoy)!
I am addicted….so much fun

Game broke after the final boss and forced me to replay the entire section (including 10ish minute unskippable cutscene) 

Some of the mini games are fun but gets repetitive fast. Can’t recommend.
First quarter was charming but it got really weird. Latter half was far too drawn out and exhausting.
This is the kind of VR app you play when you’re having a bad day and need a good laugh. If you hate this game you probably have a poor sense of humor……..or you’re a commie

reviews.review_title: AMAZING but needs a gun range
reviews.review_description: If there was a gun range then we would really have the American dream and it needs more story I can’t believe how spot on the game is with America

This is a shooting gallery game with a very sarcastic theme.  The shooting is spot on if you can hold your hands steady.  It is not an action game.  You are not shooting at people.  The bullets are used in place of tasks.  For example when playing catch with dad, shoot at the ball coming at you to throw it back.  To clean your room, shoot at the things on the floor like books and toys.  You are not moving around, but moving your gun in the direction of the targets.  Ten dollars or less is perfect for this game.  It can help with hand eye coordination in a fun environment.  The scenery is a basic cartoonish style that works with the story.  If you are looking for head shots, blood and gore - this game is not for you.  If you can't find humor in using guns for everyday life in a sarcastic way, then you won't like this.  I thought it was a great idea to keep it simple and fun.
America

reviews.review_title: Marvelous  I married a man half way
reviews.review_description: I went into this app thinking I was gonna get a game with some shooting mini games and a smart @$$ dog I got the dog but I'm only half way through and married my neighbors had a baby spent $11 in game dollars given the 45 long slides chugged a few beers passed out and the rest is for you too enjoy well worth $15 I was impressed
I would have rated it five Stars if I didn't get shot by my dog 🐕🐕 XD That's a pretty strange fact to throw into a game 😂
This isn't a game, it's a bloomin' art installation. Amazing satire and all a bit Wonka at the end. 10000% loved it

reviews.review_title: Great game, hilarious and handles well
reviews.review_description: ALL DETRACTORS ARE COMMIE SCUM, SEETHE SOY CONSUMERS

Fun, nostalgic(esque) shooting game. It has a Fallout kinda feeling to it. All within a carnival ride. Loving every second of this! Can't wait to see where this game goes. And what the Devs have in store for it.

reviews.review_title: This game is so fun and funny!
reviews.review_description: Reminds me of an interactive ride at Disney World but definitely don't expect rainbows and unicorns!  lol

If you like Fallout 3/4 humour you’ll like this…

After finishing this, I feel like I’m ready to become an American! This game is the pre-entry exam to getting a green card and I just know I’m going to ace the test now! All thanks to this The American Dream game! 

A must buy for all people planning on becoming an American, studying American history, or just planning on visiting!
This is hilarious game and is a great joy if you can take a joke.
